label: Bootcamp grad transitioning from teaching to a product role

axes.target_role: Product role at an early-stage company
axes.edge_case: career change after 6 years in another field

resume_text:
Riley Chen
riley.chen@example.com | linkedin.com/in/riley-chen-example

OBJECTIVE
Product role at an early-stage company, ideally in ed-tech, healthcare, or developer tools, where I can combine 6 years of classroom-tested communication skills with new technical fluency.

EDUCATION
Generic Coding Bootcamp, Software Engineering Immersive (Mar-Sep 2024)
- Full-stack JavaScript bootcamp; built 4 capstone projects including a React + Node SaaS dashboard
B.A. Education, State University (2018)
- Honors program, GPA 3.91, Highest Honors in Education thesis

EXPERIENCE
6th Grade Math Teacher, Public School District (2018-2024)
- Designed differentiated curriculum serving 130 students per year across 4 sections
- Improved end-of-year standardized math scores from 47th to 68th percentile over 4 years
- Led grade-level team of 8 teachers; ran weekly retros and professional development sessions
- Managed conflict resolution across student, parent, and admin stakeholders weekly

Software Engineering Intern, Health Tech Startup (Sep 2024 - Mar 2025)
- Built patient-onboarding flow in React + Node, reduced drop-off from 38% to 14%
- Wrote and shipped first integration tests, brought coverage from 0% to 41% in 4 months
- Worked directly with founders on product decisions; sat in on every customer call
- Drafted 6 bug-report templates that the support team still uses

Volunteer Product Lead, Ed-Tech Nonprofit (2023-present)
- Specced and shipped SMS-based homework reminder system for 200+ families
- Conducted 18 user interviews to validate the feature before any code was written
- Wrote launch retro that's now the template for 2 other nonprofits using the platform

SKILLS
React, TypeScript, Node, Postgres, basic Python; user research, instructional design, classroom management

OTHER
Certified Math Teacher (multi-subject + mathematics)
